title: How did I make $200,000 with YT Shorts?

transcript.text: I posted 300 YouTube shorts in the last 6 months and it generated me over $200,000. [music] So, here's how you can simply copy me. Step one, choose a niche. Go to Next Level website and find the niches that are getting tens of millions of views on brand new [music] channels and rank them based on these criteria. Step two, choose a format. If an original video blows up in a lower category of content, you can always upgrade it and get even more views. Step three, find viral ideas. We've collected over a thousand different ideas using only VidiQ and this ChatGPT prompt. Step four, [music] create content guidelines and give them to your team to guarantee the content quality. And lastly, before you actually post your video, turn on this one secret feature that I'll leave in the description to get millions of views.
